headline: Why The Caterpillar (CAT) Narrative Is Shifting As Price Targets Rise And Cycle Risks Stay In Focus
summary: Caterpillar's modelled fair value has been updated to US$754.33 from US$742.18, a small upward move in the target level that many investors will notice. Recent Street research links higher targets like this to refreshed views on long term demand, digital efforts, and the construction cycle, while still flagging questions around valuation and cyclicality. As you read on, you will see how these shifting assumptions and commentaries are shaping the evolving Caterpillar narrative and what that...

headline: Sonoco price target lowered to $68 from $69 at Truist
summary: Truist lowered the firm’s price target on Sonoco (SON) to $68 from $69 and keeps a Buy rating on the shares as part of a broader research note previewing Q1 results in Packaging and Paper Products. The firm is updating its estimates to reflect current market conditions, including elevated energy and freight costs, along with the ongoing trends gleaned during its recent check-ins with the management and comments made during the recent industry conferences, the analyst tells investors in a researc

headline: Why The Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Debate Valuation
summary: The updated Street fair value estimate for Old Dominion Freight Line has shifted to US$201.21 from US$199.25, a modest change that still catches the eye given how closely this stock is watched. Analysts are adjusting targets across the transportation group, with some raising Old Dominion’s price targets by amounts ranging from about US$1 to US$50, while others are trimming ratings as they weigh freight cycle trends, valuation, and the strength of the company’s physical network. As you read...
